entry.title: Looking for accommodation
entry.content:
If you are reading this, there is a significant chance that I applied to a room or apartment that you advertised either on flatfox, on homegate or on wgzimmer. Probably you are wondering, why should you pick me as a tenant, while you also question my sanity. I can assure you, that I am indeed a great tenant and I should definitely be your number one choice for the advertised room/apartment. Check out this list below to find a few reasons why you should pick me:

  • I am allergic to basically everything in this world, meaning that I will keep your place clean (I would die otherwise).
  • I don't play any musical instruments because I have no money to buy one or time to pratice.
  • I am a chill person who likes to laugh and have fun, but this does not mean that I am not working hard basically all the time.
  • I am extremely tidy (probably OCPD) so I am not going to make a mess in the house.
  • I do indeed, pretty much love dogs and cats (I am allergic to their fur of course).
  • I will help you with your maths and physics homework.

And the list goes on and on. Are you convinced that I am the perfect tenant? Reach out to me via email. Are you not convinced that I am the perfect tenant? Reach out anyways and let me prove it to you.

Jokes aside. I am looking for a place starting from the 1st of September in Zurich, preferable around Oerlikon. I am open to WGs and apartments/studios as well. If you know something that I might find interesting, contact me via email.

My email: gubazoltan99@gmail.com
entry.summary: If you are reading this, there is a significant chance that I applied to a room or apartment that you advertised either on flatfox, on homegate or on wgzimmer. Probably you are wondering, why should you pick me as a tenant, while you also question my sanity. I can assure you, that I am indeed a great tenant and I should definitely be your number one choice for the advertised room/apartment. Check out this list below to find a few reasons why you should pick me: I am allergic to basically everything in this world, meaning that I will keep your place clean (I would die otherwise). I don't play any musical instruments because I have no money to buy one or time to pratice. I am a chill person who likes to laugh and have fun, but this does not mean that I am not working hard basically all the time. I am extremely tidy (probably OCPD) so I am not going to make a mess in the house. I do indeed, pretty much love dogs and cats (I am allergic to their fur of course). I will help you with your maths and physics homework. And the list goes on and on. Are you convinced that I am the perfect tenant? Reach out to me via email. Are you not convinced that I am the perfect tenant? Reach out anyways and let me prove it to you.

entry.title: Making a new website
entry.content:
Recently, I got bored of the look of my website, so I decided to mix things up and create a new one. First, I was baffled by the vast number of softwares one can use to create a personal website. Initially, I thought that using plan html was the way, but soon I realized that I am not skilled enough to work with huge html files. Somehow I got to know jekyll , which is a static website builder tool. It turns out that quite a lot of people use it to create website. As a result you can find a large number of different templates that you can use as a starting point for your personal website. The template I use right now is called al-folio . It is a simple and elegant template which I like a lot to be honest. Also, decorating your website is easy due to the large number of tutorials that you can find on the web.

Needless to say that I should be writing my thesis :).
entry.summary: Recently, I got bored of the look of my website, so I decided to mix things up and create a new one. First, I was baffled by the vast number of softwares one can use to create a personal website. Initially, I thought that using plan html was the way, but soon I realized that I am not skilled enough to work with huge html files. Somehow I got to know jekyll , which is a static website builder tool. It turns out that quite a lot of people use it to create website. As a result you can find a large number of different templates that you can use as a starting point for your personal website. The template I use right now is called al-folio . It is a simple and elegant template which I like a lot to be honest. Also, decorating your website is easy due to the large number of tutorials that you can find on the web.
